name: Image Generation
description: AI Image Generation — Generates images from text prompts using multiple providers (Pollinations, Gemini, OpenAI DALL-E, Stability AI, HuggingFace). Fully autonomous package with its own TOML configuration.

tool_schema.name: IMAGE_GEN__generate_image
tool_schema.description: Generates an image from a text description. Uses the configured provider.

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image or photo to generate. Translate to English if needed.

slash_commands.description: Genera un'immagine AI da una descrizione testuale
slash_commands.example: /img foto fotorealistica di un gatto su Marte
